concerns: Contracts layer (#267) used placeholder recordingId/transcript/summary - #268 includes fix to rename to sessionId and correct kinds
Signing secret is deliberately optional (diverges from GitHub/Slack pattern) - documented in #268 spec
Ghost Wispr webhook push capability is an external dependency - must be implemented separately on the Raspberry Pi
Session IDs are timestamp strings (20260326041405) - safe for NATS segments but not validated by the contracts helper
